meta.title: Didi Cohen | Rosen Method & Kundalini Yoga
meta.description: Rosen Method Bodywork sessions and Kundalini Yoga with Didi Cohen in Rehavia, Jerusalem.
meta.ogDescription: A quiet space for body awareness, movement and meeting yourself.

brand.name: Didi Cohen
brand.aria: Didi Cohen — return to the top

hero.title: A place to listen to what the body already knows
hero.intro: Rosen Method Bodywork and Kundalini Yoga in a quiet, attentive space in Rehavia, Jerusalem.

intro.title: When there is room to soften, something new can become possible.
intro.body: Through gentle touch, conversation, movement and breath, we can meet the body with curiosity—not as something to fix, but as a living part of who we are.

about.title: Presence, curiosity and a human meeting
about.lead: I’m Didi Cohen, a Rosen Method Bodywork intern, Kundalini Yoga teacher and trainer, based in Rehavia, Jerusalem.
about.body1: I began studying Rosen Method in 2019 and completed the training program in 2023. My background also includes a BSW in Social Work from Bar-Ilan University and work as a software engineer—different worlds that each taught me something about listening, complexity and change.
about.body2: I’m married to Maayan and father to Pelly Fani. Together, we care for Beit Shel Yoga (House of Yoga), a studio and community in Jerusalem. I teach a weekly Kundalini Yoga group and offer private classes alongside individual Rosen sessions.
about.credential1: Rosen Method Bodywork studies, 2019–2023 · currently an intern

services.title: Two ways of coming closer to yourself
services.intro: Each path has its own language and pace. We can begin with what feels right for you now.

rosen.title: Rosen Method Bodywork
rosen.lead: A gentle practice that combines attentive touch and conversation to invite awareness of habitual muscle tension and breathing patterns.
rosen.body: A session takes place on a treatment table, with the client comfortably clothed in underwear and covered as needed. Touch is responsive rather than forceful. There is no goal you have to achieve; sensations, breath, words or quiet can each be part of the meeting. Rosen Method is a complementary wellbeing practice and is not a replacement for medical or mental-health care.
rosen.note: In Rehavia, Jerusalem · By appointment · Offered as part of my supervised internship

yoga.title: Kundalini Yoga
yoga.lead: A practice combining movement, breath, attention and rest, adapted to the people in the room.
yoga.body: Classes offer a structured opportunity to move, breathe and notice. You do not need previous experience or a particular level of flexibility. I teach a weekly group at Beit Shel Yoga and offer private sessions that can be shaped around your pace and needs.
yoga.note: Weekly group class · Private classes by arrangement · Jerusalem

contact.title: Maybe this is a good place to begin
contact.body: You’re welcome to write or call with a question, to hear more, or to arrange an introductory conversation. No commitment and no need to know exactly what you’re looking for.
